question: T-019 has just had a fresh oil sample analysed and the DGA record is now on file. Review that gas profile, identify the most likely failure mode it points to, and convert that finding into a corrective inspection work order whose priority reflects the implied severity.
answer: The result indicates the DGA analysis of T-019 has identified hydrogen (H2) and acetylene (C2H2) levels that are indicative of an arc fault. This has been matched to failure mode FM-006 "Arc Discharge" which has a "critical" severity. A work order has been submitted to inspect the transformer and undertake the recommended corrective action, with a high priority reflecting the severity of the fault.

arguments.issue_description: Arc damage detected, follow [recommended_action] from failure mode FM-006
